channel.title: Self Esteem on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Self Esteem on Have an average day :|

item.title: Failure is always an option
item.description: “It is possible to commit no mistakes and still lose. That is not a weakness; that is life.” Jean Luc Picard AKA “The knack of flying is learning how to throw yourself at the ground and miss.” - Douglas Adams Lately we’ve been dealing with self-esteem in the Smalley home. I remember being 6 and the confusion of a major life change. I remember the anger at myself I was feeling at 10-14.
